Welcome

Apex Roofing & Restoration

Apex Roofing & Restoration has been serving Austin and the surrounding region with premium roofing services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Austin Trusts Apex Roofing & Restoration

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment

What We Do

The Benefits of Choosing Apex Roofing & Restoration

Contact Us →
“
After the April hailstorm left my Round Rock home with dozens of damaged shingles, Apex had a crew out within hours to tarp the worst spots. Their detailed documentation helped State Farm approve a full replacement without hassle. The new impact-resistant shingles look great and give me peace of mind.
— James T.
Who We Serve

Industries & Clients We Serve

General Contractors

Trusted partner for commercial and residential builders

Private Residences

Premium roofing solutions for discerning homeowners

Commercial Properties

Durable systems for offices, retail, and industrial

Municipal Buildings

Reliable service for government and public facilities

Historic Preservation

Sensitive restoration of heritage structures

Apex Roofing & Restoration provides premium roofing services to Austin, TX and surrounding communities. Quality, integrity, and craftsmanship define everything we do.
